title: Stiletto knife
description: Resource pack replacing iron sword with Stiletto Knife.
body:
![.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/23aab348849242dc6990344982be21792a77709d_0.webp)

Resource pack replacing the iron sword with a Stiletto Knife. Inspired by the knives from Counter Strike 2. And the knife itself is copied from my comb. 

![Comb](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/11817d9f312a03642b60304899bd0446f338ec9a_0.webp)
![CS2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1559f73e4fb45432be659b06d718e52e5360864b_0.webp)
![Mine version in Minecraft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ed31119a8ac177a8959135e27259961212311430.png)

I would be very grateful for your support! If you like my work, you can write me a free comment under any post on Ko-Fi, and I will develop new projects or improve existing ones according to your wishes. 

[Support me on PayPal](https://www.paypal.com/donate/?hosted_button_id=ZY6NQ5T2YTB6C)
